description_long: This object is a decorative stone pedestal featuring a round, shallow basin at the top, supported by a sculptural column adorned with three elephant heads. The elephants are carved in high relief, their trunks and tusks forming a prominent motif around the upper section. The basin appears weathered, with a slightly uneven rim and some discoloration, suggesting exposure to the elements. The column sits atop a rectangular plinth, which is set on a roughly square base that blends into the surrounding ground. The surface of the stone is aged, with visible cracks, chips, and patches of moss or dirt, adding to its antique character. The overall design is ornate, likely intended as a garden ornament or birdbath in a public park or urban green space.
description: A weathered stone pedestal with a round basin supported by three sculpted elephant heads, set on a rectangular plinth and square base, showing signs of age and outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three elephant heads in high relief and the round basin above, with the plinth and base visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the elephant heads and the curvature of the basin, with more visible weathering on the plinth.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the elephant heads and the full rectangular plinth, with the basin's rim and some ground detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the elephant heads' side profiles and the base's integration with the ground.
attribute_ornamentation: Three elephant heads carved in high relief encircle the upper column, with detailed trunks and tusks forming a decorative motif beneath the basin.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular plinth set on a roughly square platform, with visible weathering, cracks, and some moss or dirt, giving it an aged appearance.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a shallow, round basin with a slightly uneven, weathered rim and some discoloration, serving as a receptacle.
attribute_surrounding_features: Patches of grass, dirt, and stone paving are visible around the base, blending the object into a natural or landscaped setting.
